title: Finite Counting And Pigeonhole Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite counting pigeonhole Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: PHP(3,2) injective-placement conflict: three pigeons must each choose exactly one of two holes while no hole may receive two pigeons.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional counting rows only when they add distinct integer-count or Boolean proof pressure; keep general combinatorics and asymptotic identities in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed counting identities as deterministic LIA/enumeration checks.
Replay finite combinatorial witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the resource-backed pigeonhole CNF regression checking generated DRAT and elaborated LRAT proofs.
Keep general combinatorial identities, generating functions, and asymptotics marked Lean-horizon.
